title: R-0019: 87A rebate applies — New Regime, income ₹12L, full rebate offsets slab tax
notes: Income exactly ₹12L — right at the New Regime rebate boundary. Rebate = min(80,000, 60,000) = ₹60,000. Net slab tax after rebate = ₹20,000. Old Regime: income ₹12L > ₹5L limit → no rebate. This demonstrates the significant tax advantage at the ₹12L New Regime threshold.
